title: Administrative Entities * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Administrative Entities * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administrative offices for Oregon’s statewide system of county ODHS offices serving adults and children with intellectual or developmental disabilities. Provides information about available services and directs callers to their local office. County Community Developmental Disability Program (CDDP) offices determine eligibility. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Children and adults with intellectual/developmental disabilities, and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 945-5811 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
